revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|花長下神社}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hananagashimo Shrine
| native_name = 花長下神社
| image = Hananagashimo jinja.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hananagashimo Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|35.513885|136.594845}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hananagashimo Shrine'''|花長下神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}

* {{ill|Q11609223|ltq=Q11609223|qid=Q11609223|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province}}

** P156: {{ill|Kiburi Shrine|lt=Kiburi Shrine|ja|来振神社|qid=Q11523697|1=Kiburi Shrine}}

Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* はなながしもじんじゃ

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 3200005006085

== street address (P6375) ==

* {'text': '岐阜県揖斐郡揖斐川町谷汲名礼848', 'language': 'ja'}







[[JA:花長下神社]]

{{wikidata link|Q11615718}}

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
 | 名称=Hananagashimo Shrine
 | 画像=[[File:Hananagashimo jinja.jpg|250px|Hananagashimo Shrine]]
 | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ibi District|Q1204309|qid=Q1204309|1=Ibi District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Ibigawa|Q1204046|qid=Q1204046|1=Ibigawa}} Tanigumi Narei 848
 | 位置={{Coord|35|30|49.7|N|136|35|41.6|E|type:landmark_region:JP-21|display=inline,title}}
 | 祭神=Akafusuma Inuo Ōsumi Hiko Sawake-no-Mikoto
 | 創建=
 | 社格={{ill|lt=Shikinaisha small shrine|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}, former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}
 | 例祭=September 7 (every other year)
 | 本殿=
 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hananagashimo Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''Hananagashimo Shrine''' (はなながしもじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ibigawa|Q1204046|qid=Q1204046|1=Ibigawa}} (former {{ill|lt=Tanigumi Village|Q7683297|qid=Q7683297|1=Tanigumi, Gifu}}), {{ill|lt=Ibi District|Q1204309|qid=Q1204309|1=Ibi District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}.

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (Hananagashimo Shrine, {{ill|lt=Ōno District (Mino Province)|Q11439757|qid=Q11439757|lt=Ōno District|1=Ōno district}}, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|qid=Q864156|lt=Mino|1=Mino Province}}), and its former {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}.

=== Outline ===
*The time of initial enshrinement is unknown.
*It has a close relationship with {{ill|lt=Hananagakami Shrine|Q11615716|qid=Q11615716|1=Hananagakami Shrine}}, also in former Tanigumi Village. Akafusuma Inuo Ōsumi Hiko Sawake-no-Mikoto (deity of Hananagashimo Shrine) and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amenomikatsuhime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (deity of Hananagakami Shrine) are deities in {{ill|lt=Izumo mythology|Q582846|qid=Q582846|lt=Izumo myths|1=Izumo Province}} described in the ''{{ill|lt=Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki|Q11395858|qid=Q11395858|1=Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki}}''; Hananagashimo Shrine is considered male deity and Hananagakami Shrine female deity (there is also a theory they are a married pair). Also, the September 7 festival is held alternately by Hananagashimo Shrine and Hananagakami Shrine.
*The precincts are a habitat of {{ill|lt=Himeharuzemi cicada|Q5976326|qid=Q5976326|1=Euterpnosia chibensis}}, and are designated a natural monument by Gifu Prefecture<ref>{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=http://www.pref.gifu.lg.jp/kyoiku-bunka-sports/bunka-geijutsu/bunkazai-zuroku/bunkazai-zuroku/tenki/ibigawachou/himeharuzemi.html |title=ヒメハルゼミ生息地 |publisher=Gifu Prefecture |accessdate=2012-10-17}}</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
*Akafusuma Inuo Ōsumi Hiko Sawake-no-Mikoto
:A deity of {{ill|lt=Izumo mythology|Q582846|qid=Q582846|lt=Izumo myths|1=Izumo Province}}. Also written as Akafusuma Inuo Ōsumi Hiko Sawake-no-Mikoto. It appears in the ''Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki'' in Inuo-go of {{ill|lt=Akika District|Q11595889|qid=Q11595889|1=Aika district}} and Inu-go of {{ill|lt=Izumo District|Q10896679|qid=Q10896679|1=Izumo district}}, and is said to be a child of {{ill|lt=Omizunu-no-Kami|Q48745416|qid=Q48745416|lt=Yatsukamizu Omitsuno-no-Mikoto|1=Omizunu}}, though details are unknown. It is enshrined at {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inu Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} in {{ill|lt=Izumo|Q825166|qid=Q825166|1=Izumo, Shimane}}, {{ill|lt=Shimane Prefecture|Q132751|qid=Q132751|1=Shimane Prefecture}}.

=== Location ===
*Tanigumi Narei 848, Ibigawa, Ibi District, Gifu Prefecture

=== Transportation ===
*About 5 km from {{ill|lt=Tanigumiguchi Station|Q7683296|qid=Q7683296|1=Tanigumiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tarumi Railway|Q11543718|qid=Q11543718|1=Tarumi Railway}}.

=== Other ===
*Alternative readings for Hananagashimo Shrine include “Hanaka-shimo-jinja” and “Hanashimo-jinja.” In ''Shikinaisha Chōsa Hōkoku'' (ed. Shikinaisha Research Society, Kōgakkan University Press), the reading is given as “Hananagashimo-jinja.”

=== Notes ===
{{脚注ヘルプ}}
